articles.title: From Gullit to Thiem: San Siro is filled with stars for Milan-Juve
articles.summary: Everything is ready for Milan-Juve, a big match that could prove fundamental for Champions League qualification. As reported in today's edition of Corriere dello Sport, there will be no shortage of VIP guests.

articles.title: LIVE MN - Primavera, Milan-Cagliari (2-1): nice victory for the Rossoneri
articles.summary: Excellent victory for the Rossoneri, who did well to stay in the game after Cagliari's lead at the start of the match.

articles.title: Longoni urges Milan to push for Goretzka: “It would be a real coup”
articles.summary: Leon Goretzka has ended up at the top of AC Milan’s wish list, with an offer already tabled, and the journalist Andrea Longoni has urged them to go through with the deal.  Although there are still five games left of the season, Milan have already begun planning for the summer mercato and the 2026-27

articles.title: Jugovic: "In my time the real problem was finishing in second place and not first"
articles.summary: A match like Milan-Juventus escapes any type of prediction and mood situation on the eve: let alone if it is played with five matchdays to go with very important points for qualification for the Champions League.

articles.title: Rocchi case, Simonelli: "Avoid exploitation that only generates misinformation. It is never allowed to question the credibility of the system and the regularity of the championship"

articles.title: Raimondi towards Milan-Juve: "Only one doubt at Milanello and it will be resolved this afternoon"
articles.summary: Bartesaghi yes or Bartesaghi no? In recent days the left side has not been at his best and therefore Allegri is inclined to start Estupinan from the start this evening against Juventus.

articles.summary: Today, Milan hopes to find the goals of its attackers again against Juventus, in a big match that could define the Rossoneri's season.

articles.summary: (ANSA) - TURIN, APRIL 26 - Juventus is leaving for Milan and the group also includes Kenan Yildiz and Dusan Vlahovic.
